## Proposed change

Describe the evidence or documentation change.

## Provenance and reproduction

Explain how the evidence was established and include safe, redacted commands or output another reviewer can reproduce.

## Safety checklist

- [ ] I did not upload or link to a copyrighted release, crack, patcher, key, serial, or malware sample.
- [ ] I removed private paths, usernames, tokens, and unrelated personal information.
- [ ] Hashes are lowercase and use the type declared in the JSON entry.
- [ ] I ran `python3 tools/validate_database.py` if I changed the database.
- [ ] I ran `python3 tools/render_database_summary.py` if I changed the database.
- [ ] I understand that submission does not guarantee inclusion or recognition.
